channel.title: Dropout Presents
channel.description: Latest releases from Dropout Presents on Dropout.tv

item.title: Cameron Esposito: Four Pills
item.description:
Cameron Esposito discusses being diagnosed with bipolar disorder and the events that led up to it.

Duration: 1:02:39

Tags: Dropout Presents, stand up comedy, improv, laughing, cameron esposito, mental health, drugs, alcoholism, religion, relationships, hobbies
